name: Oatmeal Choco-Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over oatmeal; let stand at room temperature for 10 minutes.
2. Add sugars, margarine, and eggs; beat until combined.
3. Add flour, baking soda, salt, cocoa, and mix thoroughly.
4. Add half of chocolate chips and blend in.
5. Pour into greased 9x13 inch pan.
6. Sprinkle remaining chocolate chips and walnuts on top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes.
